items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Juan Figueroa-Cruz was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· On April 26, the Paterno Family Beaver Stadium Run for Special Olympics Pennsylvania drew thousands of participants. Proceeds benefit athletes across PA. Troop G Community Services Officer Trooper Rhymestine helped carry the Flame of Hope and light the main cauldron.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 5 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Rylee Anderson was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 4 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Roberto Valdez was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· Apr 27 PSP Troop N personnel, Hazle Township FD, and Lehigh Valley EMS joined the Hazleton Area School District SADD club for a mock crash. With prom season upcoming, the goal of this demonstration is to stop young adults from driving impaired.

· Apr 23 #TakeBackDay is a free event for communities nationwide to properly dispose of old and unused prescription drugs safely and anonymously. On Saturday, April 25, from 10 a.m. - 2 p.m., turn in unneeded medications at a collection site near you: https:// bit.ly/PA-DTBP
